ddls:
CREATE TABLE "mortality_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mortality record */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the county where the death occurred */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year in which the death occurred */,
  "cause_code" TEXT /* ICD code for the cause of death */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths recorded */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* State code where the county is located */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the deceased */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the deceased */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the deceased */,
  "date_of_death" TEXT /* Date of death */,
  "place_of_death" TEXT /* Place of death */,
  "method_of_discovery" TEXT /* Method of discovery of the death */,
  "reporting_agency" TEXT /* Agency that reported the death */,
  "additional_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or remarks */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mortality_records_state_code FOREIGN KEY ("state_code") REFERENCES states ("state_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mortality_records_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mortality_records_cause_code FOREIGN KEY ("cause_code") REFERENCES causes ("cause_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* State code where the county is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the county in square miles */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the county's centroid */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the county's centroid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_counties_state_code FOREIGN KEY ("state_code") REFERENCES states ("state_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "causes" (
  "cause_code" TEXT /* ICD code for the cause of death */,
  "cause_description" TEXT /* Description of the cause of death */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the cause (e.g., accidental, intentional) */,
  "sub_category" TEXT /* Sub-category for more detailed classification */,
  "icd_version" TEXT /* Version of the ICD code used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cause_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_code" TEXT /* State abbreviation */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Full name of the state */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the state in square miles */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the state's centroid */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the state's centroid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_code")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each mortality record
Unique identifier for the county where the death occurred
Year in which the death occurred
ICD code for the cause of death
State code where the county is located
Method of discovery of the death
State code where the county is located
Area of the county in square miles
ICD code for the cause of death
Description of the cause of death
Category of the cause (e.g., accidental, intentional)
Version of the ICD code used
Area of the state in square miles
